ns0:entry.ns0:title: GorvGoyl/Clone-Wars
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GorvGoyl/Clone-Wars
Language: unknown
100+ open-source clones of popular sites like Airbnb, Amazon, Instagram, Netflix, Tiktok, Spotify, Whatsapp, Youtube etc. See source code, demo links, tech stack, github stars.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PicoTrex/Awesome-Nano-Banana-images
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PicoTrex/Awesome-Nano-Banana-images
Language: unknown
A curated collection of fun and creative examples generated with Nano Banana & Nano Banana Pro🍌, Gemini-2.5-flash-image based model. We also release Nano-consistent-150K openly to support the community's development of image generation and unified models(click to website to see our blog)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudcommunity/Free-Certifications
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudcommunity/Free-Certifications
Language: unknown
A curated list of free courses with certifications. Also available at https://free-certifications.com/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: e2b-dev/awesome-ai-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/e2b-dev/awesome-ai-agents
Language: unknown
A list of AI autonomous agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fastfire/deepdarkCTI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fastfire/deepdarkCTI
Language: unknown
Collection of Cyber Threat Intelligence sources from the deep and dark web

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruanyf/weekly
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruanyf/weekly
Language: unknown
科技爱好者周刊，每周五发布
